name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Group or Account Discovery
notes: This Building Block matches when a group or account discovery action is performed.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Group or Account Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
when the event matches "Command Arguments" is not NULL or "Command" is not NULL AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Command Arguments") MATCHES '.*"(groups|users|w(ho(ami)?)?|ldapsearch|id)".*' OR "Command" MATCHES '.*?net(\.exe\")?\s+(localgroup|group.*?\/domain).*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Group or Account Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
AND when the event matches "Command Arguments" is not NULL or "Command" is not NULL AQL filter query

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command Arguments") MATCHES '.*"(groups|users|w(ho(ami)?)?|ldapsearch|id)".*' OR "Command" MATCHES '.*?net(\.exe\")?\s+(localgroup|group.*?\/domain).*' AQL filter query
